imagegen.name: imagegen
imagegen.description: Generate or edit raster images when the task benefits from AI-created bitmap visuals such as photos, illustrations, textures, sprites, mockups, or transparent-background cutouts. Use when Codex should create a brand-new image, transform an existing image, or derive visual variants from references, and the output should be a bitmap asset rather than repo-native code or vector. Do not use when the task is better handled by editing existing SVG/vector/code-native assets, extending an established icon or logo system, or building the visual directly in HTML/CSS/canvas.

openai-docs.name: openai-docs
openai-docs.description: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains.

plugin-creator.name: plugin-creator
plugin-creator.description: Create and scaffold plugin directories for Codex with a required `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, optional plugin folders/files, and baseline placeholders you can edit before publishing or testing. Use when Codex needs to create a new local plugin, add optional plugin structure, or generate or update repo-root `.agents/plugins/marketplace.json` entries for plugin ordering and availability metadata.

skill-creator.name: skill-creator
skill-creator.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

skill-installer.name: skill-installer
skill-installer.description: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos).

agent-browser.name: agent-browser
agent-browser.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.

brainstorming.name: brainstorming
brainstorming.description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

consulting-analysis.name: consulting-analysis
consulting-analysis.description: Use this skill when the user requests to generate, create, or write professional research reports including but not limited to market analysis, consumer insights, brand analysis, financial analysis, industry research, competitive intelligence, investment due diligence, or any consulting-grade analytical report. This skill operates in two phases — (1) generating a structured analysis framework with chapter skeleton, data query requirements, and analysis logic, and (2) after data collection by other skills, producing the final consulting-grade report with structured narratives, embedded charts, and strategic insights.

find-skills.name: find-skills
find-skills.description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
keywords: 当用户提出可能需要专业能力的问题

frontend-design.name: frontend-design
frontend-design.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

industry-research.name: industry-research
industry-research.description: Comprehensive industry research skill providing methodologies, frameworks, and best practices for analyzing industry trends, key companies, market dynamics, and industry-specific developments across consumer, tech, healthcare, and finance sectors

release-skills.name: release-skills
release-skills.description: Universal release workflow. Auto-detects version files and changelogs. Supports Node.js, Python, Rust, Claude Plugin, and generic projects. Use when user says "release", "发布", "new version", "bump version", "push", "推送".

web-research.name: web-research
web-research.description: Use this skill for requests related to web research; it provides a structured approach to conducting comprehensive web research

audit-skills.name: audit-skills
audit-skills.description: Expert security auditor for AI Skills and Bundles. Performs non-intrusive static analysis to identify malicious patterns, data leaks, system stability risks, and obfuscated payloads across Windows, macOS, Linux/Unix, and Mobile (Android/iOS).

obsidian-resolve-links.name: obsidian-resolve-links
obsidian-resolve-links.description: 解析 Obsidian 笔记中的 [[wikilink]] 双括号引用，找到其对应的真实文件路径。当用户需要知道某个 md 文件中引用的其他文档在哪里、或者需要读取被引用文档的内容时使用。前提：用户系统中已安装 obsidian CLI，且 Obsidian 已打开对应的 vault。
keywords: 找到其对应的真实文件路径
文件中引用的其他文档在哪里
或者需要读取被引用文档的内容时使用

find-skills-plus.name: find-skills-plus
find-skills-plus.description: 跨多个 Skills 生态搜索和安装 Agent Skills。当用户需要某项能力、问"有没有能做XX的skill"、"帮我找个skill"、"搜索skill"时使用。覆盖 skills.sh、awesome-claude-skillss、antigravity-awesome-skills 三大来源。

ruuliu-kb-operator.name: ruuliu-kb-operator
ruuliu-kb-operator.description: 操作百度如流知识库（https://ku.baidu-int.com/knowledge/HFVrC7hq1Q/pKzJfZczuc/DpLUIDuJL3/_ZFCQy7SxVuv8T）的文档。浏览目录、创建新文档、编辑文档内容、发布更新、移动文档。当用户提到如流知识库、知识库文档、https://ku.baidu-int.com/knowledge/HFVrC7hq1Q/pKzJfZczuc/DpLUIDuJL3/_ZFCQy7SxVuv8T 或要求在如流中创建/编辑内容时使用。

clawteam-multi-agent-coordination.name: ClawTeam Multi-Agent Coordination
clawteam-multi-agent-coordination.description: This skill coordinates multiple AI agents as a team when users request team creation, agent spawning, task assignment, or complex work that benefits from parallel subtask delegation. Provides guidance for the ClawTeam CLI tool for orchestrating teams with task management, messaging, monitoring, and recovery tooling.

keywords: 前缀来调用浏览器自动化能力

create-rule.name: create-rule
create-rule.description: Create rules for persistent AI guidance. Use when the user wants to create a rule, add coding standards, set up project conventions, configure file-specific patterns.

create-skill.name: create-skill
create-skill.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Comate's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

create-subagent.name: create-subagent
create-subagent.description: Create custom subagents for specialized AI assistants

figma2code.name: figma2code

capability-evolver.name: capability-evolver
capability-evolver.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.

cron-mastery.name: cron-mastery
cron-mastery.description: Master OpenClaw's timing systems. Use for scheduling reliable reminders, setting up periodic maintenance (janitor jobs), and understanding when to use Cron vs Heartbeat for time-sensitive tasks.

cron-scheduling.name: cron-scheduling
cron-scheduling.description: Schedule and manage recurring tasks with cron and systemd timers. Use when setting up cron jobs, writing systemd timer units, handling timezone-aware scheduling, monitoring failed jobs, implementing retry patterns, or debugging why a scheduled task didn't run.

desktop-screenshot.name: desktop-screenshot
desktop-screenshot.description: Windows桌面截图自动化功能。使用PowerShell和.NET Framework图形API捕获整个桌面屏幕，保存为PNG格式，并可发送给用户。当用户需要获取桌面截图、验证OpenClaw本地自动化能力、或需要Windows环境下的屏幕捕获功能时使用此技能。

docx-cn.name: docx-cn
docx-cn.description: Word 文档处理 | Word Document Processing. 创建、读取、编辑 Word 文档 | Create, read, edit Word documents. 支持 .docx 格式、格式化、表格、图片 | Supports .docx format, formatting, tables, images. 触发词：Word、文档、docx.

elite-longterm-memory.name: elite-longterm-memory
elite-longterm-memory.description: Ultimate AI agent memory system for Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT & Copilot. WAL protocol + vector search + git-notes + cloud backup. Never lose context again. Vibe-coding ready.

feishu-bitable.name: feishu-bitable
feishu-bitable.description: 飞书多维表格(Bitable)API技能。用于创建、读取、更新和删除飞书多维表格的数据表、记录和字段。
keywords: 更新和删除飞书多维表格的数据表
用于操作飞书多维表格的完整技能

feishu-bridge.name: feishu-bridge
feishu-bridge.description: Connect a Feishu (Lark) bot to Clawdbot via WebSocket long-connection. No public server, domain, or ngrok required. Use when setting up Feishu/Lark as a messaging channel, troubleshooting the Feishu bridge, or managing the bridge service (start/stop/logs). Covers bot creation on Feishu Open Platform, credential setup, bridge startup, macOS launchd auto-restart, and group chat behavior tuning.

feishu-common.name: feishu-common
feishu-common.description: Provides: - Tenant token acquisition and cache - Retry and timeout handling - Authenticated request wrapper with token refresh

feishu-doc-helper.name: feishu-doc-helper
feishu-doc-helper.description: 飞书文档创建、读取、编辑和管理的完整指南。包含重要发现：create操作的内容写入不可靠，必须使用create+write两步操作；API不支持表格功能。当需要操作飞书文档、创建会议纪要、分享文档链接、编辑文档内容或遇到文档内容写入问题时使用此技能。
keywords: 编辑和管理的完整指南

last30days.name: last30days
last30days.display_name: last30days: Research Any Topic from the Last 30 Days
last30days.description: Research any topic from the last 30 days on Reddit + X + Web, synthesize findings, and write copy-paste-ready prompts. Use when the user wants recent social/web research on a topic, asks "what are people saying about X", or wants to learn current best practices. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY and/or XAI_API_KEY for full Reddit+X access, falls back to web search.

memory-hygiene.name: memory-hygiene
memory-hygiene.description: Audit, clean, and optimize Clawdbot's vector memory (LanceDB). Use when memory is bloated with junk, token usage is high from irrelevant auto-recalls, or setting up memory maintenance automation.

memory-setup.name: memory-setup
memory-setup.description: Enable and configure Moltbot/Clawdbot memory search for persistent context. Use when setting up memory, fixing "goldfish brain," or helping users configure memorySearch in their config. Covers MEMORY.md, daily logs, and vector search setup.

keywords: 每天早上自动生成个性化简报

nano-pdf.description: Edit PDFs with natural-language instructions using the nano-pdf CLI.

obsidian.name: obsidian

obsidian-sync.name: obsidian-sync
obsidian-sync.description: Sync files between Clawdbot workspace and Obsidian. Run the sync server to enable two-way file synchronization with the OpenClaw Obsidian plugin.

ocr.name: ocr
ocr.description: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tool, supports Chinese and English text extraction from PDFs and images. Use cases: (1) extract text from scanned PDFs, (2) recognize text from images, (3) extract text content from invoices, contracts, and other documents

powerpoint-pptx.name: PowerPoint PPTX
powerpoint-pptx.description: Create, edit, and automate PowerPoint presentations with python-pptx for slides, layouts, charts, and batch processing.

proactive-agent.name: proactive-agent
proactive-agent.description: Transform AI agents from task-followers into proactive partners that anticipate needs and continuously improve. Now with WAL Protocol, Working Buffer, Autonomous Crons, and battle-tested patterns. Part of the Hal Stack 🦞

security-auditor.name: security-auditor
security-auditor.description: Use when reviewing code for security vulnerabilities, implementing authentication flows, auditing OWASP Top 10, configuring CORS/CSP headers, handling secrets, input validation, SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, or any security-related code review.

smart-ocr.name: smart-ocr
smart-ocr.description: 智能OCR技能，支持多种OCR方式：PaddleOCR、浏览器工具、在线服务等。可从图像中提取文本，支持中文、英文等语言。

summarize-tool.name: summarize-tool
summarize-tool.display_name: Summarize Tool - 文本总结工具
summarize-tool.description: 1. **输入处理**：接收待总结的文本 2. **分析阶段**：识别文本类型、结构和关键元素 3. **提取阶段**：提取核心信息和重要观点 4. **生成阶段**：基于提取信息生成总结 5. **优化阶段**：调整格式、长度和风格 6. **输出阶段**：返回最终总结结果
keywords: 提取核心信息和重要观点
基于提取信息生成总结

workspace-organizer.name: workspace-organizer
workspace-organizer.display_name: workspace-organizer - 工作空间整理技能
workspace-organizer.description: 1. **整理工作空间** 2. **按任务而非文件类型整理** 3. **先解决编码问题** 4. **回忆之前的UTF8解决方案** 5. **使用UTF8编码修复目录名** 6. **按任务名称而非主题整理** 7. **系统级路径不能修改** 8. **脚本工具和测试文件都是为某个具体任务而创建的，不要单独给他们创建一个目录，除非你无法定位他们属于哪个任务** 9. **只整理散落的文件，不要动已经在特定任务目录中的文件，对于不确定的文件先不要动** 10. **先给方案，经确认后再执行**
keywords: 按任务而非文件类型整理
按任务名称而非主题整理
脚本工具和测试文件都是为某个具体任务而创建的
